# data/sdtm/

This folder contains the **SDTM output datasets** generated by the mapping programs.

## Generated files (after running programs)

| File | Domain | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `dm.sas7bdat` | DM | Demographics — 1 row per subject |
| `vs.sas7bdat` | VS | Vital Signs — 1 row per subject per test per visit |
| `ae.sas7bdat` | AE | Adverse Events — 1 row per event |
| `ex.sas7bdat` | EX | Exposure — 1 row per treatment period per subject |

## How to generate

Run the SDTM programs in order:
```
programs/sdtm/dm.sas
programs/sdtm/ex.sas
programs/sdtm/vs.sas
programs/sdtm/ae.sas
```

Or run the full pipeline: `run_all.sas`

## Standard

All datasets conform to **CDISC SDTM IG v3.4**.  
Datasets are excluded from version control (`.gitignore`) — regenerate from source programs.
